title: Add GSC import tooling for weekly SEO review
summary: Records release evidence for the Search Console CSV importer, fixture-driven test, and playbook updates that turn the weekly SEO review into a repeatable workflow instead of a manual spreadsheet exercise.
completed_todo_items: Review impressions, CTR, ranking movement, and indexed pages at the end of each week.

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms a raw GSC page export plus query export can be imported into the weekly tracker with top queries and 7-day metrics populated correctly.

ops.rollback_plan: Delete the GSC importer, fixture data, test, and playbook command references if the weekly SEO operating flow moves to a different ingestion model.
